args.subject: Summary of the client meeting
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this message finds you well. Here is a summary of our recent client meeting:

We discussed your requirements for the new project and agreed on the project timeline and key milestones. We also reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered your valuable feedback.

The next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024, where we will continue our discussions and review progress on the action items.

Please find the detailed meeting minutes attached for your reference.

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
